vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Supports the entire robot arm structure and payload
Rotational motion around the base joint axis
Heat dissipation from harmonic drive to ambient
Power and signal routing from base to upper joints

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to uneven heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Add additional cooling channels or fins to improve heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Risk of cable strain due to inadequate routing.
risk.mit: Ensure proper strain relief and routing channels for all cables.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear datum.
risk.mit: Add clear datum features and improve assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness due to thin wall sections.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness in critical areas or add structural reinforcements.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress due to poor sealing at cable entry.
risk.mit: Improve sealing around cable entry grommet and consider additional sealing methods.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry

physics_paths.description: Supports the entire robot arm structure and payload
Rotational motion around the base joint axis
Heat dissipation from harmonic drive to ambient
Power and signal routing from base to upper joints

integration_opportunities.description: Base plate can be bolted to a fixed structure for stability
Cable entry grommet allows for easy cable management
Leveling screws allow for fine adjustment of the base

manufacturing_strategy.support: Orientation: Flat surface on base plate
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM verification of hole patterns and surface finish

verification_focus.description: Verify the base plate can support the robot arm and payload
Verify the harmonic drive can rotate within the specified range
Verify heat dissipation from the harmonic drive
Verify electrical connectivity through the cable entry grommet

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

physics_paths.path: Heat from joint friction transfers to reducer housing via thermal conduction, then to surrounding air via convection.
Motor torque is transmitted through cycloidal reducer to output shaft, causing joint rotation.
Encoder signals travel from joint to control unit via harness.
Maintenance access to joint components via service openings and removable covers.

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Access to joint components for maintenance through service openings.
Provision for harness routing through cable spine clips.
Alignment features for precise assembly of mating parts.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: H7/h6 fit class for bearing seats and reducer dummies
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures for overhanging features during LPBF
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for critical dimensions, visual inspection for fit and finish

verification_focus.focus: Joint torque capacity under cyclic loading
Ease of assembly and disassembly for maintenance

risk.mit: Implement a wear-resistant coating or upgrade the bearing material.

risk.desc: The heat sink design may not be sufficient to dissipate heat from the motor under full load.
risk.mit: Increase the surface area of the heat sink or add additional cooling features.

risk.desc: The service panel may not provide adequate access for maintenance if the design is too compact.
risk.mit: Expand the service panel area or add removable sections.

risk.desc: The fastener interfaces may require additional torque settings to ensure proper preload.
risk.mit: Conduct torque tests and adjust settings as necessary.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

Signal channel runs from the sensor hub to the driver bay.
Thermal inspection window allows monitoring of driver bay temperature.
Service cover provides access to driver bay for maintenance and inspection.
Driver bay shell supports the harmonic drive enclosure.

integration_opportunities.description: Keying ensures correct orientation of connectors.
Service cover provides access for maintenance.

verification_focus.description: Ensure the mass is within the budget.
Verify the structural integrity under design loads.
